creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #0)
> currently against ports r454917 snapshot

Apologies for the typo. ports r454917 was the last *successful* build and was for 11.0-RELEASE. Every build for 11.1-RELEASE thus far hanged. The current one is against ports r456533 which is just 1 day old.

So, let's focus on 12.0-CURRENT packages for now.
